calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs Of $1,350; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Arkady Itkin
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs Of $1,350 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and consistent with the parties' agreement and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, judgment shall be entered as such: Plaintiff San Francisco Surgery Center shall recover from Defendants Igor Melinkov and Masha Gershman, jointly and severally, $66,975 (made up of $39,000.00 in principal, $26,625.00 in late fees under the stipulation/agreement, and $1,350 in attorney's fees and costs per stipulation/agreementt). On the record before the court, this is the judgment authorized by the settlement agreement.

Prior to the time set for hearing, Plaintiff shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org (copying all parties entitled to notice) a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

Prior to the time set for hearing, Plaintiff shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org (with proof of prompt service to all parties entitled to notice) a proposed judgment conforming to the requirements in the Code of Civil Procedure and California Rules of Court, ideally on the appropriate Judicial Council form.

Order is signed. The propsed judgment submitted prior to the hearing is rejected.

Counsel for the PLaintiff to re-submit (with proof of prompt service to all parties entitled to notice) a proposed judgment conforming to the requirements in the Code of Civil Procedure and California Rules of Court, ideally on the appropriate Judicial Council form and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-31-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2024 Set For Trial On Feb-24-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default(And Default Judgment)]- Masha Gershman
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendant Gershman's motion to vacate the default/default judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Gershman's motion to vacate the default/default judgment is granted. There is a strong policy to hear cases on the merits. (Elston v. City of Turlock (1985) 38 Cal.3d 227, 233 (superseded by statute on other grounds).) Defendant's declaration shows that she was not personally served with the summons and complaint. The default/default judgment are void and defendant is entitled to relief per CCP 473(d), which does not have a proposed pleading requirement. In any event, since defendant seeks relief under CCP 473(b), defendant shall answer by November 15, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
